facts.label: Mode
facts.evidence: The official game page says the game can be played alone or in online multiplayer co-op.

facts.label: Party size
facts.evidence: The official game page says play alone or with up to three friends.

facts.label: Solo support
facts.evidence: The official Steam listing describes co-op as optional and lists Single-player.

facts.label: Store features
facts.evidence: These capabilities are listed in the Steam store feature panel.
